overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a Ravenclaw student exploring the Hogwarts Hospital Wing. The character walks through the infirmary with hospital beds, passes medical supply shelves, and descends spiral staircases through gothic stone corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle infirmary with hospital beds and medical equipment

events.description: passes two students sitting on a couch conversing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the infirmary, passing hospital beds and glancing at medical equipment

notable_agents.action: two students in school uniforms sitting on a couch conversing

entered.detail: tall gothic windows with blue curtains allowing natural light to stream in
large dark wood cabinet with carved details and brass handles
metal frame bed with white sheets and medical equipment beside it
large blue and white ceramic pot containing a leafy tree
brown leather couch where students are seated

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright, spacious infirmary with tall gothic windows and blue curtains. Hospital beds with white sheets line the room, and two students sit conversing on a brown leather couch. Large wooden wardrobes and potted plants decorate the space as natural light illuminates the stone tile floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical supply area with potion shelves

events.description: exits the main infirmary hall into the medical supply area with potion shelves
passes through stone archway into corridor leading to staircase

agents.ego_description: approaching the medical station and continuing through the stone archway into the corridor

notable_agents.action: medical attendant in dark robes standing by the potion shelves facing away from camera

entered.detail: tall wooden shelves filled with glass bottles and medical supplies
anatomical skeleton model standing next to the shelves
gothic stone arch with carved details leading to corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open infirmary into a narrower medical supply area with tall wooden shelves holding potion bottles. A medical skeleton stands in the corner near an NPC attendant. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and interior light as the character approaches and passes through a stone archway into a corridor.

events.description: lighting shifts from natural window light to warm candlelight from wall sconces

agents.ego_description: walking down the wooden spiral staircase, following the curve of the steps

entered.detail: wooden spiral stairs with worn brown steps curving downward
curved wooden handrail following the spiral of the staircase
lit candles in wall-mounted holders providing warm light
decorative circular stone pattern on the floor at the bottom landing

segments.scene_description: The character enters and descends a tight spiral staircase with wooden steps and a curved handrail. The environment becomes enclosed with no visible sky, illuminated only by candle sconces on the stone walls. At the bottom, a decorative circular emblem is set into the wooden floor of the landing area.

events.description: exits spiral staircase into lower corridor with portrait gallery

agents.ego_description: walking through the portrait-lined corridor and down the second wooden staircase

entered.detail: oval and rectangular framed portraits hanging on the stone walls
lit lantern with glass panels mounted on the corridor wall
second wooden staircase leading further down to lower levels

segments.scene_description: Leaving the spiral staircase, the character walks across a wooden floor through a corridor lined with framed portraits and wall lanterns. The environment remains enclosed with artificial lighting. The character then approaches and begins descending a second wooden staircase to reach lower levels of the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open infirmary into the enclosed, dimly lit depths of the castle's stone corridors. It begins in a spacious hospital wing filled with natural light from tall gothic windows, passing by white-sheeted beds and students resting on a leather couch. As the character moves forward, the space narrows into a medical supply area lined with potion bottles and a skeletal model before passing through a stone archway. The scene then shifts into a tight, candle-lit spiral staircase where the daylight vanishes, descending toward a decorative circular emblem on a wooden landing. Finally, the camera glides through a corridor of framed portraits and wall lanterns before beginning a second descent down another wooden staircase into the lower levels.
